title: Korean Beef Stir Fry
description: A spicy and savory Indian-inspired stir fry made with beef, Korean chili flakes, and sticky rice. Perfect for a quick and flavorful meal.
instructions: Marinate the beef strips in a mixture of soy sauce, Korean chili flakes, and vegetable oil for at least 30 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the marinated beef strips and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the sticky rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Season with soy sauce and Korean chili flakes to taste.
Transfer the stir fry to a serving platter and garnish with chopped green onions.
